summary.assessment: FAIR: 5 moderate issues found. Address CRITICAL and HIGH issues before feature development.

critical.issue: CRITICAL: ops is 100% NULL despite having obp+slg components.
critical.recommendation: Verify Task 7 implementation: _ingest_mlb_box_stats() should compute ops.
critical.sql_check: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mlb_player_stats WHERE obp IS NOT NULL AND slg IS NOT NULL AND ops IS NULL

critical.issue: CRITICAL: whip is 100% NULL despite having components.
critical.recommendation: Verify Task 7 implementation: WHIP should be (BB+H)/IP.
critical.sql_check: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mlb_player_stats WHERE walks_allowed IS NOT NULL AND hits_allowed IS NOT NULL AND whip IS NULL

critical.recommendation: Fix calculation bug or NULL out impossible values.
critical.sql_check: SELECT bdl_player_id, era, earned_runs, innings_pitched FROM mlb_player_stats WHERE era > 100 ORDER BY era DESC LIMIT 10

high.issue: EMPTY but should have data: Statcast ingestion failing due to 502 errors (Task 5).
high.recommendation: Implement retry logic with exponential backoff (1-2 hours work).
Run fuzzy name matching to link these records to player_id_mapping.
high.sql_check: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM position_eligibility pe LEFT JOIN player_id_mapping pim ON pe.yahoo_player_key = pim.yahoo_key WHERE pim.yahoo_key IS NULL

info.issue: Empty as expected: BDL API doesn't provide probable pitcher data (Task 4).
info.recommendation: Use MLB Stats API instead or mark as intentionally empty.

info.issue: Empty by design: Infrastructure exists but logging not implemented (Task 6).
info.recommendation: Implement full audit logging (4 hours, medium priority).

report:
================================================================================
VALIDATION AUDIT SUMMARY
================================================================================

CRITICAL issues:  3
HIGH issues:     2
MEDIUM issues:   0
LOW issues:     0
INFO issues:    2

🔴 CRITICAL ISSUES FOUND

1. [Computed Fields] mlb_player_stats
   Issue: CRITICAL: ops is 100% NULL despite having obp+slg components.
   Fix: Verify Task 7 implementation: _ingest_mlb_box_stats() should compute ops.

2. [Computed Fields] mlb_player_stats
   Issue: CRITICAL: whip is 100% NULL despite having components.
   Fix: Verify Task 7 implementation: WHIP should be (BB+H)/IP.

3. [Data Quality] mlb_player_stats
   Issue: CRITICAL: 1 rows have ERA > 100 (impossible).
   Fix: Fix calculation bug or NULL out impossible values.

🟠 HIGH PRIORITY ISSUES FOUND

1. [Empty Tables] statcast_performances
   Issue: EMPTY but should have data: Statcast ingestion failing due to 502 errors (Task 5).
   Fix: Implement retry logic with exponential backoff (1-2 hours work).

2. [Foreign Keys] position_eligibility
   Issue: 477 orphaned position_eligibility rows (no yahoo_key match).
   Fix: Run fuzzy name matching to link these records to player_id_mapping.

ℹ️  INFORMATIONAL ITEMS

1. [Empty Tables] probable_pitchers
   Note: Empty as expected: BDL API doesn't provide probable pitcher data (Task 4).

2. [Empty Tables] data_ingestion_logs
   Note: Empty by design: Infrastructure exists but logging not implemented (Task 6).


================================================================================
OVERALL ASSESSMENT
================================================================================

⚠️  FAIR: Moderate issues found
   5 issues need attention for optimal data quality.
   Prioritize CRITICAL and HIGH issues before feature development.

================================================================================
END OF VALIDATION AUDIT
================================================================================
